phases.name: discovery
phases.goal: Validate the problem, define the MVP scope, and set up the development environment
features: User interviews with 5 freelancers to validate invoice pain points
Define MVP user stories and acceptance criteria
Set up Next.js, Supabase, Tailwind CSS project skeleton
Configure CI/CD pipeline and Vercel deployment
milestones: Discovery sign-off: MVP scope locked, all stories defined in backlog

risks.risk: User interviews reveal a different core pain point
risks.mitigation: Adjust scope before committing to MVP build

decision_points: Go/No-go: Is the problem validated and the scope achievable in 4 weeks solo?

phases.name: mvp
phases.goal: Build and deploy the core invoicing workflow: auth, invoice CRUD, PDF export, and status tracking
features: Email/password registration and login (Supabase Auth)
Create invoice with client name, line items, totals, due date
Invoice list view with status filter (Draft / Sent / Paid / Overdue)
Edit and delete draft invoices
Mark invoice as sent and paid
Export invoice as PDF (React-PDF or similar)
Client management (add, edit, list clients)
Overdue invoice detection (automated status update)
Basic dashboard: total outstanding, total paid this month
milestones: Week 2: Auth + Invoice CRUD complete, deployed to Vercel staging
Week 4: All MVP features shipped, alpha testers invited

risks.risk: PDF generation is more complex than estimated
risks.mitigation: Use a proven library (React-PDF); limit to 1 template for MVP

risks.risk: Supabase Row-Level Security misconfiguration exposes user data
risks.mitigation: RLS policies reviewed and tested before any alpha user is onboarded

decision_points: Go/No-go alpha launch: All MVP stories done, no critical bugs, RLS security tested

phases.name: stabilization
phases.goal: Run alpha with 20–50 testers, fix critical bugs, and collect feedback
features: Alpha feedback form embedded in app
Error monitoring setup (Sentry)
Performance audit (Lighthouse, Core Web Vitals)
Bug fixes from alpha feedback (critical and high priority only)
Basic empty states and onboarding copy for first-time users
milestones: Alpha close: Feedback report completed, Beta scope defined

risks.risk: Alpha feedback invalidates a core feature assumption
risks.mitigation: Treat as a learning, not a failure — adjust Beta scope accordingly

decision_points: Go/No-go Beta: Are alpha users actually sending invoices? Is the core loop working?

phases.name: enhancement
phases.goal: Implement highest-value features identified during alpha
features: Automated payment reminder emails (scheduled via Supabase Edge Functions)
Invoice templates (select from 2–3 visual styles)
Recurring invoice support
CSV export of invoice history
Public invoice link (shareable URL, no login required for client)
milestones: Beta launch: All Enhancement features shipped to waitlist

risks.risk: Recurring invoice scheduling is complex to implement correctly
risks.mitigation: Start with a simple RRULE-based implementation; defer edge cases to V1.1

decision_points: Go/No-go Pro launch: Are users willing to pay for the Pro tier features?
